name: sales ops managers at Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For sales ops managers at Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate commission reporting causes delayed payouts. We provide formatted monthly payout reports instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.

problem_solved: Inaccurate commission reporting leads to delayed payouts.
features: manual data entry for commission data
